title: stevia nepetifolia f. mollis
intro: Stevia nepetifolia f. mollis is a variant of the Stevia nepetifolia plant, a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its unique chemical composition. The plant is used to promote oral health and prevent tooth decay, as well as to treat digestive issues and reduce blood sugar levels. Stevia nepetifolia f. mollis is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used as a sweetener due to its natural sweetness, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns.
